Sarnak Ceremonial Dagger  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 6
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +3 INT: +3
WT: 1.2 Size: TINY
Class: BRD ROG NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Sarnak Ceremonial Dagger
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: RANGE PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 6 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 6
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +3 INT: +3
WT: 1.2 Size: TINY
Class: BRD ROG NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:6 pp 5 gp 2 sp 2 cp
Tribute:58
Submitted By:Mynea
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-14 17:45:26
Page Updated:Wed Apr 28th, 2010

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 187pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 25
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Burning Woods
NPC Name
a sarnak extremist
a sarnak zealot - Burning Woods

Crypt of Dalnir
NPC Name
a kly invoker

Frontier Mountains
NPC Name
a Sarnak enthusiast

Lake of Ill Omen
NPC Name
a Sarnak gem oracle
a Sarnak recruit

The Overthere
NPC Name
a Sarnak enthusiast


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Burning Woods
The Overthere
On various Sarnaks


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
still drops
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2007 at 3:45 AM Rating: Decent
snailish
4,580 posts
The value of the Sarnak Ceremonial Dagger as a range item for casters has obviously been surpassed since the bulk of the posts on this thread. As to the rarity of the item, I have cleared the sarnak fort in Lake of Ill Omen on two occassions and looted one of these daggers. That's a decent drop rate at this time, but I could have just been lucky.
▲ Page top
Bazaar!
QuoteReply
# Aug 07 2002 at 3:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362226287
2 posts
For all of you who don't have Luclin...I pity you.
I really do.
For all of you newbish types like me who do have Luclin...save, save, save, and go to the Bazaar and have a ball! It's a buyer's dream in there...competition lowers prices to next to nothing, and the little guys like us can finally score some decent stuff cheap =)

I bought this thing for about 20pp...not too bad at all.

Edited, Wed Aug 7 15:56:33 2002
▲ Page top
Silly me
QuoteReply
# May 23 2002 at 3:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755225460
8 posts
I sold this thing to a merchant because the weapon sucks. Didn't even notice it was range wearable Item till I looked here. Duh <-- Bangs his head on the desk.
▲ Page top
Left Plat
QuoteReply
# May 22 2002 at 3:12 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779153796
5 posts
I was on Left Plat about two days ago and had it drop. My grp didnt notice I had looted it so I didn't say anything. We had set earlier that we would roll for the tabard, bracer, and leggings that drop there. No one on Tunare really knows how rare it is I think.

Honoria Kneechopper
26 Warrior
The Pygmy Coalition, Tunare

Got one
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2001 at 1:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250860531
5 posts
I had a friend give it to me after mistakenly purchasing it for another of his characters and he found out he couldn't use it. Good thing it fits in the range slot cause it's actually not a great weapon. All the Int I get will help.

Miikail Hadeshorn
Wizard in the 24th Power
Mith Marr
▲ Page top
Lucky
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2001 at 2:29 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
A couple of nights ago, I was shopping for my level 16 spells in Freeport and a guy, not sure of level, gave me one of these and 3 raw-silk cloaks for free. I put this in my range slot and gave the cloaks to newbies in the zone.
▲ Page top
Right Patio
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2001 at 4:07 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I got mine yesterday at the Sarnak Fort (LOIO) on the right patio off of a Sarnak Gem Oracle. Conned red to me at 23, but the group took it down without fuss. I would have to say that if you don't have the money to purchase other int items for the range slot, i.e. Students Homework, then this is the perfect item for pure casters. Easily attainable for a lower 20's character to get it (Just make sure you have a group). Thanks Gethebie (a Rockin' 23 Monk) for the dagger!!!

Raiestlyn
lvl 23 Wizard
Fates Messengers
Zeb Server
▲ Page top
LOIO
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2001 at 11:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248950964
66 posts
Got this off an adherent in LOIO. I was shocked by the selling price. Sold it in FP for 250 PP. The reason it is so expenisive is that it can be put in the ranged slot.

Argaha
30th Tribunal Shaman
M Marr

As i was going from FM to sell stuff in lake i decided to say hello to some old Sarnaks friends at the fort in Lake of Ill Omen and ask them a few plats.
The gem oracle at the top of the tower dropped it :)

▲ Page top
umm... price check?
QuoteReply
# May 20 2001 at 10:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248869849
4 posts
i just hunted in Lake of ill omen today and looted a Blade of Passage, Finely Crafted Sheer blade, and one of these, a Sarnak Ceremonial Dagger... they didnt seem to be too good, the stats arent too impressive and i dont see any good stats, yet the price says around 700-1000pp ... this isnt even a rare drop. Why is it worth so much???
▲ Page top

Scholar

Dalnirs
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 10:07 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Last night while hunting in Dalnir's the Ceremonial Dagger dropped off of one of the Kly casters (evoker, invoker) in the Overseer's room.
▲ Page top
Necro
QuoteReply
# May 03 2001 at 4:44 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Can you say dagger of marnak? Same INT bonus as dagger at a cost of 100pp, and sometimes less. Sarnak dagger is much more expensive, but all the necro cares about is INT not WIS, so why waste time with this, when you can the same int bonus at 1/6 of the cost? GOD, I love being a necro!
▲ Page top
Dagger sighting
QuoteReply
# Apr 27 2001 at 2:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758211806
14 posts
At Sarnak Fort in LOIO. Was in a group inside front door. An Adherant added to our battle (con'd dark blue). Slayed him and got dagger.

I asked group if anyone needed, nobody spoke up.

May still give it to my enchanter friend though. Need before greed (whatta concept!)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 24 2001 at 6:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) they say it drops from any sarnaks... so do earing of station. both i have looted in dalnir, and seen both droped at the fort in LoIO
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 22 2001 at 11:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I sold This Today For 1k lol bought it for 400pp
Range Slot
QuoteReply
# Mar 21 2001 at 7:24 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591754843431
1 post
Hi Hi :)
Got this Dagger today in Dalnir off Kly sarnak on the 2nd floor. How can you say it's awful when it can be used by casters in the RANGE SLOT! I know it doesn't say it up there but it can be place in the Range slot and never used as a weapon but as an Intel bonus !! Too bad druids can't use it :)

Happy Hunting

Carley Swiftheart
HOLDERS OF LIGHT
The Nameless
▲ Page top
RE: Range Slot
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2001 at 3:41 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yep He's right. I got this dagger around 28th level looting a corpse in the sarnak fortress. I can't remember what kind of Sarnak it was, but it can definitely be used in the range slot, making it very nice.
▲ Page top
RE: Range Slot
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2001 at 8:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758588779
69 posts
I know this item is worth 1k on many servers, but i got mine for 600. The fact that it is lore is not what i personally like about it, but i can use my staff of the observers and this weapon, which is fine until i get my GBS...hehe
▲ Page top
How to get it
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2001 at 11:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754057068
2 posts
Only dropped on sarnaks at fort not others wandering.....and they drop VERY RARELY! Drops off all sarnaks in fort....cant really camp for it just go there for xp and hope it turns up. Real popular for range slot....IO traded mine for a very nice 1200pp robe crystal something shroud or whatever but I got a good deal. Just come and hope it turns up.. (No real minimum lvl can be 18+)
▲ Page top
got one
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2001 at 3:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757353219
10 posts
Well i just loot it on an adherant by beeing on the ledge at right side in the fortress.

A friend enchanter will be happy with that.
i've also got a blade of passage from an other one. good weapon (hp+20 dmg7 1HS) it saved me from death few times ehehe.

Camp the 3 Spawn
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2001 at 1:06 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Just wanted to confirm that the 3 spawn in OT has it, RARELY!
I was camping there with a group for 8-12+ hours for the exp, and it happened to appear on an adherant...
only thing that got me PO'ed was when I found it has wis, is for the range slot, and druids can't use it!
Anyway if you want to see it, send me a Tell before it winds up on my Necro or one of my other pure casters, awsome graphic btw if you ask me :-)

Kolwithe Thunderheart
Druid of the 35th Season
Bertox
